query:
-- Buscar leads em atendimento e agrupar por corretorId
SELECT 
  corretorId,
  COUNT(*) as total_leads
FROM leads 
WHERE status = 'em_atendimento'
GROUP BY corretorId
ORDER BY total_leads DESC;

-- Buscar informações dos corretores associados aos leads
SELECT DISTINCT
  l.corretorId,
  u.id as user_id,
  u.name,
  u.email,
  COUNT(l.id) as leads_count
FROM leads l
LEFT JOIN users u ON l.corretorId = u.id
WHERE l.status = 'em_atendimento'
GROUP BY l.corretorId, u.id, u.name, u.email
ORDER BY leads_count DESC;
